testcases.input: nums = [1,3,5,2,1,3,1] Output: 4 Explanation: One of the optimal rearrangements is perm = [2,5,1,3,3,1,1]. At indices = 0, 1, 3, and 4, perm[i] > nums[i]. Hence, we return 4.
